title: Bachelor of Vocation (Banking, Insurance & Financial Services) in association with The George Telegraph Institute of Accounts
content: About the program- The dynamic Bachelor of Vocation in Banking, Insurance, & Financial Services prepares students for financial services careers with practical and theoretical knowledge. This course integrates general education with skill development and emphasises work-integrated learning to teach students banking, insurance, and financial services skills. Sector: BFSI Class XII with minimum 50% marks Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list NOTE- Earn & Learn - Earn stipend between Rs. 8000/- to Rs. 15000/- per month Class XII with minimum 50% marks Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list NOTE- Earn & Learn - Earn stipend between Rs. 8000/- to Rs. 15000/- per month
